<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Get User-Flow Errors"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/self-service/errors"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

This endpoint returns the error associated with a user-facing self service errors.

This endpoint supports stub values to help you implement the error UI:

`?id=stub:500` - returns a stub 500 (Internal Server Error) error.

More information can be found at
[Ory Kratos User User Facing Error Documentation](https://www.ory.com/docs/kratos/self-service/flows/user-facing-errors).

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
